b:T8dd0,<div class="specification">
<p>Measurements of the lung capacity of a student were recorded using a spirometer and displayed with a data logger. Initially the student was at rest, then changed to carrying out strenuous exercise. The results are displayed in the graph.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Calculate the ventilation rate at rest, giving the units.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Explain the changes in ventilation after 35 seconds.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Suggest how the total lung volume at rest would differ for a patient with emphysema.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>c:T535,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>12 breaths per minute/6 litres per minute ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>breaths per minute.</em></p>
<p><em>Accept answers from 5.5 to 6 litres per minute.</em></p>
<p><em>Answer must include breaths or litres and a standard unit of time.</em></p>
<p><em>Correct:</em><br/><em>eg: 12 breaths / minute</em><br/><em>eg: 0.1 L sec<sup>–1</sup> or 6 L min<sup>–1</sup></em></p>
<p><em>Incorrect:</em><br/><em>eg: but 12 breaths = 0 marks</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. the volume of air per breath increases<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>the volume of each breath reaches a maximum/levels off<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>frequency of ventilation/breaths per minute increases ✔</p>
<p>b. exercise increases «rate of cellular» respiration/energy use/blood CO<sub>2</sub>/acidity ✔</p>
<p>c. exercise causes increased demand for oxygen/removal of carbon dioxide ✔</p>
<p>d. maximum rate/depth of ventilation is determined by the capacity of the student ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>«total resting lung volume» would be greater ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/6/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","6"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.3.SL.TZ0.2"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","6-4-gas-exchange"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
